title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins for faster development, including tools for web scraping, model swapping, token monitoring, and code generation. The plugins cover vendor integrations like Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, and Anthropic's own skill and security plugins, as well as third-party tools like BuildPartner and Morph.
